hooks.command: bash -c 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); for dir in cmd cmd/dingdong-cli internal internal/server internal/ui internal/ui/static; do if [ -d "$root/$dir" ]; then ignored=$(git -C "$root" check-ignore -v "$dir/" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ignored" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: source dir is matched by .gitignore: $ignored" >&2; echo "  Anchor binary patterns with leading slash (e.g. /dingdong-cli not dingdong-cli)" >&2; echo "  Run: make verify-fresh-clone   to confirm sources are tracked." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; done; exit 0'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking source dirs not silently gitignored...
Scanning staged diff for personal/internal patterns...

hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf %s "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"input\",{}).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); pr=$(printf %s "$cmd" | grep -oE "[0-9]+" | head -1); if [ -n "$pr" ]; then ui=$(gh pr diff "$pr" --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^internal/ui/static/" | head -1); if [ -n "$ui" ]; then echo "WARNING: PR #$pr touches internal/ui/static/ — verify in a real browser before merging." >&2; echo "  curl-only validation does not catch CSS specificity bugs (PR #5: auth-overlay)." >&2; echo "  See CLAUDE.md § Shipping Gate." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0'
